wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Bing Bong|2}}
{{R|Bing Bong||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Doll Room|2}} event. Whenever you add a card to your Deck, it will add one additional copy.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Doll Room|2}} event. 

== Interactions ==
* Bing Bong only creates a second copy of cards which are permanently added to your deck, such as from card rewards. Cards added temporarily during combat, such as from {{C|White Noise||2}}, are not duplicated.
* {{R|Pael's Tooth||2}}: The cards added back to the deck will be duplicated.
* {{2|Transform|Transformed}} cards count as added to the deck and will be duplicated as well.

=== Synergies ===
* Relics that benefit from adding cards to your deck: {{R|Lucky Fysh||2}}, {{R|Eternal Feather||2}}, {{R|Book of Five Rings||2}}
* Cloning cards via {{R|Pael's Growth||2}} triples the amount of cloned cards instead of just doubling them.
* {{R|Tanx's Whistle||2}} adds another copy of {{C|Whistle||2}} to the deck.
* {{R|Distinguished Cape||2}} adds 3 additional {{C|Apparition|Apparitions|2}} to the deck.
* {{R|Sere Talon||2}} adds 3 additional {{C|Wish|Wishes|2}} to the deck.
* {{R|Dolly's Mirror||2}} adds another copy of the copied card to the deck.

=== Anti-Synergies ===
* Curses from events or relics such as {{R|Preserved Fog||2}} or {{R|Sere Talon||2}} will be duplicated too.
* {{R|Jewelry Box||2}} adds another copy of {{C|Apotheosis||2}} to the deck.


== Trivia ==
* Bing Bong is a reference to the character of the same name and appearance from the game [https://store.steampowered.com/app/3527290/PEAK/ Peak].

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Bing Bong to the game.
